Crosshair X

The #1 crosshair overlay for competitive FPS players. Instantly upgrade your aim with a custom reticle — pick from thousands of pro & community designs, or craft your own. Trusted by millions. Works in every game.

About This Software

Dominate Every Match with the Perfect Crosshair


Crosshair X gives you a decisive competitive edge in every FPS, tactical shooter, and battle royale you play. Whether you're grinding ranked matches, clutching intense rounds, or pushing squads in open-world combat — your crosshair should never hold you back.


Trusted by millions of players and rated Very Positive with over 40,000 reviews, Crosshair X is the most popular crosshair overlay on Steam.

Why Competitive Players Choose Crosshair X

  • Thousands of Community Designs: Browse an ever-growing library of reticles shared by the Crosshair X community — including pro player replicas and tournament-ready setups
  • Precision Designer: Build your ideal crosshair from scratch with intuitive sliders for every parameter — lines, dot, outlines, color, opacity, and more
  • Works in Every Game: Overlay your crosshair on any title — first-person shooters, third-person shooters, battle royales, and tactical shooters alike
  • Game Bar Integration: The safest overlay method on PC — powered by Microsoft's trusted Game Bar platform for seamless exclusive fullscreen compatibility
  • Multi-Monitor Support: Display your crosshair on any monitor and save custom positions for each game
  • Share & Export: Share your creations with friends or save them as .PNG/.SVG files
  • Smart Toggle: Show or hide your crosshair with configurable mouse states and keyboard shortcuts
  • Workshop Powered: Discover, share, and download crosshairs via Steam Workshop

Full Customization Control

  • Lines: Opacity, Length, Width, Offset, Color, Blur, Rotation
  • Center Dot: Opacity, Size, Color, Blur
  • Outlines: Opacity, Thickness, Color, Blur
  • T-Shape: Remove the top arm — never, always, or only when firing
  • Bloom: Dynamic crosshair spread during firing
  • Position: Fine-tune X and Y coordinates for pixel-perfect placement

Your Aim, Your Rules

Stop settling for default crosshairs that disappear against bright backgrounds or blend into dark corners. Crosshair X puts you in complete control of your reticle — so you can focus on what matters: hitting your shots.

System Requirements

    Minimum:
    • OS: Windows 10
    Recommended:
    • OS: Windows 11
